description: Validation rules for backlog management integration

backlog_item_format.description: BACKLOG.md item line must match the expected format

metadata_sub_bullet_format.description: Metadata sub-bullets must match key-value bold format

jira_ticket_id_format.description: Jira ticket ID must be uppercase project key followed by hyphen and number
jira_ticket_id_format.applies_to: Jira ticket ID values (in user input and BACKLOG.md)

confluence_url_format.description: Confluence URLs must be valid HTTPS URLs
confluence_url_format.applies_to: Confluence page URLs in BACKLOG.md metadata and state.json

priority_enum.description: Priority values must be one of the recognized Jira priority levels
priority_enum.behavior_on_unknown: Accept and store as-is (Jira custom priorities allowed)

description_truncation.description: Jira ticket descriptions are truncated to 200 characters when imported
description_truncation.applies_to: Description portion of BACKLOG.md item text (after ' -- ')

examples.input: A very long description that exceeds the 200 character limit and needs to be truncated to fit within the backlog format constraint...
examples.output: A very long description that exceeds the 200 character limit and needs to be truncated to fit within the backlog format constraint...

confluence_content_truncation.description: Confluence page content is truncated to 5000 characters for context injection
confluence_content_truncation.applies_to: Confluence page content used as requirements context

section_headers_required.description: BACKLOG.md must have both ## Open and ## Completed sections

item_number_uniqueness.description: Item numbers should be unique within BACKLOG.md
item_number_uniqueness.applies_to: Item number field (N.N) across all BACKLOG.md entries

jira_backed_detection.description: An item is Jira-backed if and only if it has a **Jira:** metadata sub-bullet
jira_backed_detection.applies_to: All BACKLOG.md items when determining sync behavior

state_json_jira_fields.description: state.json active_workflow Jira fields are optional and nullable

jira_ticket_id.validation: Must match VR-003 regex when present

confluence_urls.validation: Each element must match VR-004 regex when present

state_json_jira_fields.applies_to: active_workflow and workflow_history entries in state.json

jira_sync_status_enum.description: jira_sync_status in workflow_history must be one of the recognized values

completed_date_format.description: Completed date must be ISO 8601 date format

max_backlog_items_in_picker.description: Backlog picker displays maximum 15 items from BACKLOG.md

completion_move_to_section.description: Completed items must be moved from ## Open to ## Completed section
completion_move_to_section.applies_to: Item completion flow (workflow finalize or manual mark)
steps: Move entire item block to ## Completed section

refresh_conflict_resolution.description: During backlog refresh, Jira data wins for content; local data wins for ordering

rules.title: Jira wins (overwrite local)
rules.description: Jira wins (overwrite local, apply VR-006 truncation)

reorder_local_only.description: Reorder operations are local-only and never sync priority back to Jira

workflow_type_from_jira.description: Workflow type suggestion based on Jira issue type
workflow_type_from_jira.applies_to: Workflow kick-off from Jira-backed backlog item
